name: needt-project-pilot
description: Project command center for product, AI, design, architecture, implementation, and verification planning.

interface.shortDescription: Plan and steer product, design, AI, and code work.
interface.longDescription: A repo-aware project command center that turns goals into evidence-backed requirements, design and engineering contracts, dependency-aware execution waves, persistent state, and verification gates.
defaultPrompt: Organize this project and show me the next best work.
Turn this idea into a product, design, AI, and code plan.
Audit this milestone and identify remaining delivery gaps.
